# kaleido_platform_wfe_stream_factory (Resource)

The Workflow Engine Stream Factory resource allows you to manage stream factories that create pre-configured streams in the Workflow Engine.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_type` (String) The config type ID to associate with this stream factory
- `environment` (String) The environment ID
- `event_source_json` (String) The event source configuration as JSON (the type-specific content nested under the event source type key, e.g. handler name, provider, configTypeId, configMapping).
- `event_source_type` (String) The event source type for the factory (for example: handler).
- `name` (String) The name of the stream factory
- `service` (String) The service ID

### Optional

- `constants_json` (String) Constant values as JSON that are merged into every stream created by this factory.
- `description` (String) A description of the stream factory
- `parameters_schema_json` (String) JSON Schema for the parameters that can be passed when creating streams from this factory.
- `uniqueness_prefix` (String) A string prefix to prepend to all 'topic' and 'idempotencyKey' values generated by streams created from this factory.

### Read-Only

- `api_url` (String) The factory-scoped API URL for creating streams.
- `created` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (String) Unique ID of the stream factory
- `openapi_url` (String) The factory-scoped OpenAPI specification URL.
- `updated` (String) Last update timestamp
